changeSet.author: labsolution
changeSet.comment: Ensure the three X3 result units exist as OpenELIS UOM rows carrying UCUM codes (LIS-272). uIU/mL is the one non-identity mapping: its UCUM form is u[IU]/mL, matching the bridge's unitToUcum in deploy/kit/compose/bridge-site.yml. The no-config UCUM fallback in the bridge lacked ng/dL entirely.
changeSet.sql:
WITH x3_units(unit_name, unit_code, ucum_code) AS ( VALUES ('pmol/L', 'pmol/L', 'pmol/L'), ('ng/dL', 'ng/dL', 'ng/dL'), ('uIU/mL', 'uIU/mL', 'u[IU]/mL') ) UPDATE clinlims.unit_of_measure u SET code = v.unit_code, ucum_code = v.ucum_code, is_active = 'Y', lastupdated = now() FROM x3_units v WHERE u.id = ( SELECT min(u2.id) FROM clinlims.unit_of_measure u2 WHERE lower(u2.name) = lower(v.unit_name) OR lower(u2.description) = lower(v.unit_name));
WITH x3_units(unit_name, unit_code, ucum_code) AS ( VALUES ('pmol/L', 'pmol/L', 'pmol/L'), ('ng/dL', 'ng/dL', 'ng/dL'), ('uIU/mL', 'uIU/mL', 'u[IU]/mL') ) INSERT INTO clinlims.unit_of_measure (id, name, description, lastupdated, code, ucum_code, is_active) SELECT nextval('clinlims.unit_of_measure_seq'), v.unit_name, v.unit_name, now(), v.unit_code, v.ucum_code, 'Y' FROM x3_units v WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.unit_of_measure u WHERE lower(u.name) = lower(v.unit_name) OR lower(u.description) = lower(v.unit_name) OR u.code = v.unit_code);

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM clinlims.unit_of_measure WHERE (name, code, ucum_code) IN ( ('pmol/L', 'pmol/L', 'pmol/L'), ('ng/dL', 'ng/dL', 'ng/dL'), ('uIU/mL', 'uIU/mL', 'u[IU]/mL'));

changeSet.author: labsolution
changeSet.comment: Seed the three X3 thyroid analytes as LOINC-bearing Tests with their UOM, on the LIS-299-corrected axis-consistent codes (FT3 14928-6, FT4 II 3024-7, TSH II 3016-3) (LIS-272). Reuses an existing Test when one already carries the LOINC, exactly as 050 does; descriptions are distinct so the localized-display-name collapse the H99S hit cannot recur.

changeSet.author: labsolution
changeSet.comment: Give each X3 test a NUMERIC test_result row at raw precision (significant_digits = -1) (LIS-272). Without a test_result row there is no numeric result definition to accept against; and because significant_digits lives on THIS table, a freshly-created Test is exactly the case 054 cannot reach — see cs7.
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.test_result (id, test_id, result_group, flags, tst_rslt_type, value, significant_digits, quant_limit, cont_level, lastupdated, scriptlet_id, sort_order, is_quantifiable, is_active, is_normal) SELECT nextval('clinlims.test_result_seq'), t.id, null, null, 'N', null, -1, null, null, now(), null, 1, 'f', 't', 'f' FROM clinlims.test t WHERE t.local_code IN ('X3-FT3-Serum', 'X3-FT4II-Serum', 'X3-TSHII-Serum') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.test_result tr WHERE tr.test_id = t.id);

changeSet.author: labsolution

and.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.analyzer WHERE name = 'SNIBE MAGLUMI X3'

changeSet.comment: Seed the SNIBE MAGLUMI X3 analyzer in SETUP status with the profile's identity (LIS-272). Transport (ip_address/port) is intentionally left to the operator, as with the EDAN seeds — see the header. fhir_uuid is set explicitly to satisfy the NOT NULL + UNIQUE constraint 004 adds, mirroring 052/053.
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO clinlims.analyzer (id, name, description, is_active, status, protocol_version, communication_mode, analyzer_type, identifier_pattern, fhir_uuid, last_updated)
VALUES (nextval('clinlims.analyzer_seq'), 'SNIBE MAGLUMI X3', 'SNIBE MAGLUMI X3 immunoassay analyzer (ASTM E1394-97)', true, 'SETUP', 'ASTM_LIS2_A2', 'ANALYZER_INITIATED', 'IMMUNOASSAY', '(?i)(maglumi|snibe)', gen_random_uuid(), now());

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM clinlims.analyzer WHERE name = 'SNIBE MAGLUMI X3';

changeSet.author: labsolution

and.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.analyzer WHERE name = 'SNIBE MAGLUMI X3'

changeSet.comment: Map the three bench-verified X3 wire codes to the Tests carrying their corrected LOINCs (LIS-272/LIS-299). The " II" suffixes are literal: the bridge's code lookup is exact-match, so 'FT4' would not resolve 'FT4 II'. Codes whose LOINC-bearing Test is absent are skipped rather than mapped to a NULL test_id, as in 052/053.
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.analyzer_test_map (analyzer_id, analyzer_test_name, test_id, last_updated) SELECT a.id, v.code, (SELECT min(t.id) FROM clinlims.test t WHERE t.loinc = v.loinc), now() FROM clinlims.analyzer a CROSS JOIN (VALUES ('FT3', '14928-6'), ('FT4 II', '3024-7'), ('TSH II', '3016-3') ) AS v(code, loinc) WHERE a.name = 'SNIBE MAGLUMI X3' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.test t WHERE t.loinc = v.loinc) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.analyzer_test_map m WHERE m.analyzer_id = a.id AND m.analyzer_test_name = v.code);

changeSet.author: labsolution
changeSet.comment: Re-run the LIS-188 raw-precision pass now that the X3 map exists (LIS-272). 054 is a ONE-SHOT UPDATE keyed on analyzer_test_map membership AT MIGRATION TIME, so every mapping added after it — including cs5's — is still left rounding the instrument's decimals on accept (FT4 II 1.58 ng/dL would persist as 1.6, or 2 at significant_digits = 0). The SQL is 054's, deliberately unchanged, so it stays a no-op for everything 054 already corrected.
changeSet.sql:
UPDATE clinlims.test_result SET significant_digits = -1 WHERE tst_rslt_type = 'N' AND significant_digits IS DISTINCT FROM -1 AND test_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT test_id FROM clinlims.analyzer_test_map WHERE test_id IS NOT NULL);
UPDATE clinlims.test_result_component SET significant_digits = -1 WHERE result_type = 'N' AND significant_digits IS DISTINCT FROM -1 AND test_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT tr.test_id FROM clinlims.test_result tr JOIN clinlims.analyzer_test_map m ON m.test_id = tr.test_id WHERE tr.tst_rslt_type = 'N' AND m.test_id IS NOT NULL);
